response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience spanning TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple backend languages, with recent direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that aligns with the role's stack and AI-agent requirement. Demonstrated ownership across product work, infrastructure, and open-source projects suggests strong autonomy as an individual contributor.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js + React full-stack background well beyond 6 years
Recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work matches a key requirement
Track record of ownership across product, devops, and open-source platforms
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned; Java exposure is older and limited
Significant career investment in DLang may indicate stack preferences outside the primary stack
